title: The Swan King by Unknown | Explanation in Hindi | Class 6
description:
When a dying swan lands at the feet of a wandering king, what begins as a simple act of mercy spirals into a test of courage, loyalty, and the true meaning of power — and most Class 6 students never see the twist coming. "The Swan King" is one of those rare prose pieces where every small choice a character makes carries enormous moral weight, making it a favourite for teachers who want students to think, not just memorise. If you've been searching for a clear, engaging swan king explanation in Hindi that actually makes sense of the story's deeper message, you're in exactly the right place.
